channel.title: The Daily Observer – Editorial
channel.description: Latest editorials from The Daily Observer

item.title: Jet fuel price cut brings relief to aviation sector
item.description: The Bangladesh Energy Regulatory Commission's (BERC) decision to reduce jet fuel prices offers overdue relief

item.title: Potable water crisis at Shaheed Suhrawardy Medical College Hospital
item.description: Dear sir,Shaheed Suhrawardy Medical College Hospital is one of the leading government healthcare institutions in
item.dc:creator: Letter To the Editor
